parameters.query: WITH input_row AS (SELECT '{{ $json.phone }}'::text AS phone, '{{ $json.message_id }}'::text AS message_id, '{{ $json.message_type }}'::text AS message_type, '{{ $json.text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS text, '{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_payload).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb AS raw_payload, '{{ $json.media_id || '' }}'::text AS media_id, '{{ $json.mime_type || '' }}'::text AS mime_type, '{{ $json.file_name || '' }}'::text AS file_name, '{{ $json.received_at }}'::timestamptz AS received_at), existing_state AS (SELECT * FROM driver_states WHERE phone = '{{ $json.phone }}' LIMIT 1), inserted_state AS (INSERT INTO driver_states (phone, state, dialog_mode, support_context, pending_correction_context, last_intent, last_message_at, application_status, requires_attention, created_at, updated_at) SELECT phone, 'new', 'auto', NULL, NULL, NULL, NOW(), 'collecting_data', false, NOW(), NOW() FROM input_row ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = NOW() RETURNING *) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT row_to_json(existing_state) FROM existing_state), (SELECT row_to_json(inserted_state) FROM inserted_state)) AS state, (SELECT row_to_json(input_row) FROM input_row) AS message;

parameters.jsonBody:
={"contents":[{"role":"user","parts":[{"text":"You are a strict JSON router. Return only valid JSON and nothing else.

Return only this schema:
{
  "intent": "faq",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "reply": "Текст ответа",
  "required_action": "reply",
  "requires_manager": false,
  "next_state": "new"
}

INPUT:
" + JSON.stringify({ message: $json.message, state: $json.state, support_context: $json.support_context, pending_correction_context: $json.pending_correction_context })}]}],"generationConfig":{"temperature":0.2,"responseMimeType":"application/json"}}

parameters.query: UPDATE driver_states SET state = '{{ $json.final_state }}', dialog_mode = '{{ $json.final_dialog_mode }}', support_context = {{ $json.final_support_context ? `'${JSON.stringify($json.final_support_context).replace(/'/g, "''")}'::jsonb` : 'NULL' }}, pending_correction_context = {{ $json.final_pending_correction_context ? `'${JSON.stringify($json.final_pending_correction_context).replace(/'/g, "''")}'::jsonb` : 'NULL' }}, last_intent = '{{ $json.ai.intent }}', last_message_at = NOW(), application_status = COALESCE(application_status, 'collecting_data'), requires_attention = {{ $json.final_requires_attention }}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE phone = '{{ $json.message.phone }}';

INSERT INTO conversation_messages (phone, driver_id, direction, sender_type, message_type, text, provider_message_id, delivery_status, raw_payload, created_at) SELECT '{{ $json.message.phone }}', ds.driver_id, 'outgoing', 'bot', 'text', '{{ $json.reply_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', NULL, 'pending', '{{ JSON.stringify({ ai_request: $json.ai_request, ai_response: $json.ai_response, parsed_json: $json.ai, source: "n8n" }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, NOW() FROM driver_states ds WHERE ds.phone = '{{ $json.message.phone }}' LIMIT 1;

UPDATE conversation_messages SET delivery_status = 'sent', provider_message_id = COALESCE(provider_message_id, '{{ $json.messages?.[0]?.id || $json.id || "" }}'), raw_payload = COALESCE(raw_payload, '{}'::jsonb) || '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM conversation_messages WHERE phone = '{{ $node["Save Message"].json.message.phone }}' AND direction = 'outgoing' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1);
